title: AI Chisel
subtitle: Carving Precision — Intermediate Patterns
description: Level up with intermediate algorithmic patterns: two pointers, sliding window, BFS/DFS, and tree traversals. Each pattern tied to real AI/ML applications.
audience: Engineers with DSA basics ready for medium-level problems
outcomes: Apply two pointers and sliding window to optimise solutions
Traverse trees and graphs with BFS/DFS
Connect these patterns to AI search and inference
